# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.042 — Division of Responsibilities

The board shall develop and implement policies that clearly separate the policy-making responsibilities of the board and the management responsibilities of the executive director, including the appointment of department staff, and the staff of the department.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B.604), Sec. 1.05, eff. September 1, 2019.*
